name: Qwen 3 VL Embedding 8B
description: Qwen 3 VL Embedding 8B is the latest proprietary model of the Qwen family, specifically designed for text embedding and ranking tasks. It is aimed at semantic search, retrieval, clustering, and RAG pipelines.
